mission.title: cilium: CFP: Support PROXY Protocol from external LoadBalancers
mission.description: CFP: Support PROXY Protocol from external LoadBalancers. Requested by 16+ users.

steps.title: Check current cilium deployment
steps.description:
Verify your cilium version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium
helm list -n cilium 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working cilium installation.

steps.title: Review cilium configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant cilium configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium
kubectl get configmap -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cilium
```
## Cilium Feature Proposal

Some Load Balancing solutions, such as Hetzner's LoadBalancer and AWS' Classic Load Balancer are using the [HAProxy Proxy Protocol](https://www.haproxy.org/download/1.8/doc/proxy-protocol.txt) to pass source IP

steps.title: Apply the fix for CFP: Support PROXY Protocol from external LoadBalancers
steps.description:
Adds support for proxy protocol in listeners using https://www.envoyproxy.io/docs/envoy/latest/configuration/listeners/listener_filters/proxy_protocol

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium
kubectl get events -n cilium --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "CFP: Support PROXY Protocol from external LoadBalancers" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Adds support for proxy protocol in listeners using https://www.envoyproxy.io/docs/envoy/latest/configuration/listeners/listener_filters/proxy_protocol

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with cilium installed or the issue environment reproducible.
